failures.description: The agent misread or misused the catalog search result and answered with item 1507389580 at $1157.86, even though the tool output showed item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch result. The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and showed two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer from that tool output but selected the higher-priced item. This is not an underspecified intent or invalid tool invocation; it is a reasoning error over the returned evidence.
